Headline: #126 Jackson Temporary Reroute at Jackson/Lotus
ShortDescription: 126 Jackson buses are temporarily rerouted via Jackson, Central, Madison, Laramie and Jackson: due to, police activity near Jackson/Lotus.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

#126 Jackson buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Jackson, Central, Madison, Laramie, Jackson and over regular route: due to, police activity near Jackson/Lotus.

Allow extra travel time.
